prompt: The document read service verifies tenant membership but currently returns a document owned by another member of that tenant. Add the missing object-level authorization check. Keep the externally visible and audit policies exact: a non-member receives Forbidden and one Denied/TenantMembershipRequired audit event; a member requesting an unknown document receives NotFound and one NotFound/ResourceMissing event; a member requesting another user's document also receives NotFound (to avoid disclosing its existence) but produces one Denied/ResourceOwnerMismatch event; and the owner receives Found with the document and one Granted/AccessGranted event. User identifiers are opaque and must be compared with ordinal, case-sensitive semantics. Do not change public contracts or tests.
verify_cmd: env HOME=/tmp/csharp-authz-object-scope-home XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/csharp-authz-object-scope-xdg DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp/csharp-authz-object-scope-cli NUGET_PACKAGES=/tmp/csharp-authz-object-scope-packages DOTNET_NOLOGO=1 DOTNET_SKIP_FIRST_TIME_EXPERIENCE=1 DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT=1 dotnet run --project AuthzScope.Tests/AuthzScope.Tests.csproj --configuration Release --artifacts-path /tmp/csharp-authz-object-scope-artifacts --nologo
